Innovative Climate Finance Expert Kyiv, Ukraine POSTING DATE02/25/2026 NORCAP’s partnership with Mercy Corps strengthens shared ambitions to expand renewable energy access, support green recovery, and reinforce local climate resilience efforts across Ukraine. Mercy Corps’ work spans urgent humanitarian assistance and long‑term recovery efforts, particularly in decentralised energy and market‑driven climate solutions. Transitions Adviser UNICEF Colombia NORDEM Bogota, Colombia POSTING DATE02/19/2026 TRENDING The United Nations (UN) country team in Colombia is accompanying the country in its efforts to transition from conflict to a sustainable peace. In support to this, Norcap is providing a Transitions Adviser to the UN Resident Coordinator and Humanitarian Coordinator, hosted by UNICEF, who will serve as liaison with the UN Verification Mission to Colombia on political and peace issues, and the UN Country Team and Humanitarian Country Team, as required. Justice Monitor Kosovo NORDEM Pristina, Kosovo POSTING DATE02/13/2026 The European Union Rule of Law Mission in Kosovo (EULEX) is the EU’s largest civilian mission under the Common Security and Defence Policy. Launched in 2008, EULEX supports Kosovo’s rule of law institutions in strengthening effectiveness, sustainability, multi ethnicity, and accountability, in full compliance with international human rights standards and best European practices. Environmental Adviser Armenia Yeghegnadzor NORDEM Armenia POSTING DATE02/13/2026 The European Union Mission in Armenia (EUMA) is a non‑executive, unarmed civilian mission under the EU’s Common Security and Defence Policy. The mission monitors and reports on the security situation along Armenia’s internationally recognized border with Azerbaijan, contributes to human security in conflict‑affected areas, and supports confidence‑building between communities.
